meaning: n.护土长,女舍监,保姆,主妇
examples: I'm very pleased to meet you, the matron said, I'm his mother!
Only relatives are allowed to visit patients here, the matron said.
The Tale of the Allergist's Wife, Charles Busch's comedy about an anxiety-riddled Manhattan matron.
On Sunday, the Matron and the Futurity, begun in 1892 and 1888 respectively, will be run.
